languages.text: {n}Манипулус стремительно нависает над Атилиусом, с любопытством рассматривая череп и совершенно не обращая внимания на вытянувшееся лицо префектуса.{/n} "Должен заметить, это исключительно сохранный ксенологический образец. Вольный Торговец, обратите внимание на уплощенную кромку резцов, сглаженные надбровные дуги, отсутствие третьей пары моляров, характерное для эльда... Что, Нунциус?" {n}Эоганн резко замолкает.{/n} "Да, я и впрямь увлекся, прости".

{n}The Manipulus moves swiftly to loom over Atilius, examining his cranium with curiosity and completely ignoring the prefectus's stricken expression.{/n} "I must note, this is an exceptionally well-preserved xenos specimen. Rogue Trader, observe the flattened edge of the incisors, the smooth brow ridges, the absence of the third pair of molars typical for the Aelda— what is it, Nuncius?" {n}Eogunn stops abruptly.{/n} "Yes, I did indeed get carried away, forgive me."

Вольный Торговец, обратите внимание на уплощенную кромку резцов, сглаженные надбровные дуги, отсутствие третьей пары моляров, характерное для эльда... Rogue Trader, observe the flattened edge of the incisors, the smooth brow ridges, the absence of the third pair of molars typical for the Aelda— what is it, Nuncius?" {n}Eogunn stops abruptly.{/n} "Yes, I did indeed get carried away, forgive me."

languages.text: {n}El manipulus se mueve rápidamente para colocarse sobre Atilius y examinar su cráneo con curiosidad, ignorando la expresión pasmada del prefectus por completo.{/n} «Debo decir que este es un espécimen xenos preservado de forma excepcional. Comerciante, observe el borde aplanado de los incisivos, el puente suave de la frente, la ausencia del tercer par de molares típico de los Aelda... ¿Qué pasa, Nuncius?». {n}Eogunn se detiene en seco.{/n} «Sí, me he dejado llevar, es cierto. Mis disculpas».
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus moves swiftly to loom over Atilius, examining his cranium with curiosity and completely ignoring the prefectus's stricken expression.{/n} "I must note, this is an exceptionally well-preserved xenos specimen. Rogue Trader, observe the flattened edge of the incisors, the smooth brow ridges, the absence of the third pair of molars typical for the Aelda— what is it, Nuncius?" {n}Eogunn stops abruptly.{/n} "Yes, I did indeed get carried away, forgive me."

traits.locale_text: {n}El manipulus se mueve rápidamente para colocarse sobre Atilius y examinar su cráneo con curiosidad, ignorando la expresión pasmada del prefectus por completo.{/n} «Debo decir que este es un espécimen xenos preservado de forma excepcional. Comerciante, observe el borde aplanado de los incisivos, el puente suave de la frente, la ausencia del tercer par de molares típico de los Aelda... ¿Qué pasa, Nuncius?». {n}Eogunn se detiene en seco.{/n} «Sí, me he dejado llevar, es cierto. Mis disculpas».

languages.text: {n}操纵者快步来到阿蒂利乌斯跟前，俯身仔细观察着他的颅骨，完全无视了那位行政官惊慌的表情。{/n}“我必须指出，这份异形样本保存得异常完好。行商浪人，请看门牙边缘的平整结构，平滑的眉骨，以及艾达灵族特有的第三对臼齿缺失——怎么了，努恩修斯？”{n}伊奥贡忽然停了下来。{/n}“是的，我确实太忘我了，抱歉。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus moves swiftly to loom over Atilius, examining his cranium with curiosity and completely ignoring the prefectus's stricken expression.{/n} "I must note, this is an exceptionally well-preserved xenos specimen. Rogue Trader, observe the flattened edge of the incisors, the smooth brow ridges, the absence of the third pair of molars typical for the Aelda— what is it, Nuncius?" {n}Eogunn stops abruptly.{/n} "Yes, I did indeed get carried away, forgive me."

traits.locale_text: {n}操纵者快步来到阿蒂利乌斯跟前，俯身仔细观察着他的颅骨，完全无视了那位行政官惊慌的表情。{/n}“我必须指出，这份异形样本保存得异常完好。行商浪人，请看门牙边缘的平整结构，平滑的眉骨，以及艾达灵族特有的第三对臼齿缺失——怎么了，努恩修斯？”{n}伊奥贡忽然停了下来。{/n}“是的，我确实太忘我了，抱歉。”

languages.text: {n}Der Manipulus schwebt zu Atilius, untersucht fasziniert sein Kranium, ohne dem Gesichtsausdruck des verwundeten Prefectus Beachtung zu schenken.{/n} "Ich möchte anmerken, dass es sich hier um ein außergewöhnlich gut erhaltenes Xenos-Exemplar handelt. {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}, beachtet die stumpfen Kanten der Schneidezähne, die ausgeprägten Überaugenwulste, das Fehlen der für Aeldari typischen Backenzäh... — was ist, Nuncius?" {n}Eogunn unterbricht sich abrupt.{/n} "Ja, ich schweife in der Tat ab, bitte entschuldigt."
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus moves swiftly to loom over Atilius, examining his cranium with curiosity and completely ignoring the prefectus's stricken expression.{/n} "I must note, this is an exceptionally well-preserved xenos specimen. Rogue Trader, observe the flattened edge of the incisors, the smooth brow ridges, the absence of the third pair of molars typical for the Aelda— what is it, Nuncius?" {n}Eogunn stops abruptly.{/n} "Yes, I did indeed get carried away, forgive me."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Manipulus schwebt zu Atilius, untersucht fasziniert sein Kranium, ohne dem Gesichtsausdruck des verwundeten Prefectus Beachtung zu schenken.{/n} "Ich möchte anmerken, dass es sich hier um ein außergewöhnlich gut erhaltenes Xenos-Exemplar handelt. {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}, beachtet die stumpfen Kanten der Schneidezähne, die ausgeprägten Überaugenwulste, das Fehlen der für Aeldari typischen Backenzäh... — was ist, Nuncius?" {n}Eogunn unterbricht sich abrupt.{/n} "Ja, ich schweife in der Tat ab, bitte entschuldigt."

languages.text: {n}Le manipulus se précipite auprès d'Atilius, dont il examine le crâne avec curiosité, indifférent à l'expression choquée du prefectus.{/n} « Je note que nous avons là un spécimen xénos exceptionnellement bien conservé. {mf|Libre-marchand|Libre-marchande}, observez le bord aplani des incisives, les arcades sourcilières lisses et l'absence de molaires typiques des Aelda... Qu'y a-t-il, Nuncius ? » {n}Eogunn s'interrompt brutalement.{/n} « Certes, certes... Je me suis un peu emballé. Au temps pour moi. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus moves swiftly to loom over Atilius, examining his cranium with curiosity and completely ignoring the prefectus's stricken expression.{/n} "I must note, this is an exceptionally well-preserved xenos specimen. Rogue Trader, observe the flattened edge of the incisors, the smooth brow ridges, the absence of the third pair of molars typical for the Aelda— what is it, Nuncius?" {n}Eogunn stops abruptly.{/n} "Yes, I did indeed get carried away, forgive me."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le manipulus se précipite auprès d'Atilius, dont il examine le crâne avec curiosité, indifférent à l'expression choquée du prefectus.{/n} « Je note que nous avons là un spécimen xénos exceptionnellement bien conservé. {mf|Libre-marchand|Libre-marchande}, observez le bord aplani des incisives, les arcades sourcilières lisses et l'absence de molaires typiques des Aelda... Qu'y a-t-il, Nuncius ? » {n}Eogunn s'interrompt brutalement.{/n} « Certes, certes... Je me suis un peu emballé. Au temps pour moi. »

languages.text: {n}Manipülus, hızla Atilius'un üzerine eğilerek kafatasını merakla inceliyor ve prefektusun dehşete düşmüş ifadesini görmezden geliyor.{/n} "Şunu belirtmeliyim ki bu, son derece iyi korunmuş bir zeno örneği. Hür Tacir; kesici dişlerin düzleşmiş kenarına, pürüzsüz kaş çıkıntılarına, Aeldalar için tipik olan üçüncü azı dişi çiftinin yokluğuna dikkat edin... Ne oldu Nuncius?" {n}Eogunn aniden duruyor.{/n} "Evet, gerçekten de kendimi kaptırdım. Af buyurun."
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus moves swiftly to loom over Atilius, examining his cranium with curiosity and completely ignoring the prefectus's stricken expression.{/n} "I must note, this is an exceptionally well-preserved xenos specimen. Rogue Trader, observe the flattened edge of the incisors, the smooth brow ridges, the absence of the third pair of molars typical for the Aelda— what is it, Nuncius?" {n}Eogunn stops abruptly.{/n} "Yes, I did indeed get carried away, forgive me."

traits.locale_text: {n}Manipülus, hızla Atilius'un üzerine eğilerek kafatasını merakla inceliyor ve prefektusun dehşete düşmüş ifadesini görmezden geliyor.{/n} "Şunu belirtmeliyim ki bu, son derece iyi korunmuş bir zeno örneği. Hür Tacir; kesici dişlerin düzleşmiş kenarına, pürüzsüz kaş çıkıntılarına, Aeldalar için tipik olan üçüncü azı dişi çiftinin yokluğuna dikkat edin... Ne oldu Nuncius?" {n}Eogunn aniden duruyor.{/n} "Evet, gerçekten de kendimi kaptırdım. Af buyurun."

languages.text: {n}マニピュラスは素早くアティリウスの頭上に立ち、彼の頭蓋骨を好奇心に駆られて調べ、そして執事の驚愕した表情を完全に無視する。{/n}「これは、非常に良く保存された異種生物の標本ですね。ローグ・トレーダー、この切歯の平らな縁、滑らかな眉骨、そしてアエダ族に特有の3番目の臼歯の欠如をご覧下さい。何という名前でしょう、ヌンシウス？」{n}エオグンは突然立ち止まる。{/n}「ええ、確かに熱中してしまいました。許してください。」
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus moves swiftly to loom over Atilius, examining his cranium with curiosity and completely ignoring the prefectus's stricken expression.{/n} "I must note, this is an exceptionally well-preserved xenos specimen. Rogue Trader, observe the flattened edge of the incisors, the smooth brow ridges, the absence of the third pair of molars typical for the Aelda— what is it, Nuncius?" {n}Eogunn stops abruptly.{/n} "Yes, I did indeed get carried away, forgive me."
